entry.title: Public archive for Delving Bitcoin
entry.summary:
The `discourse-archive` tool, which is designed to archive posts from Discourse forums, currently has a known issue where it may skip over some posts due to an off-by-one error in its implementation. This bug has been documented and a pull request has been made to address the problem. For further details on the bug and the proposed fix, interested parties can review the pull request at [this link](https://github.com/jamesob/discourse-archive/pull/3).
This issue highlights the importance of regular maintenance and updating of software tools to ensure accuracy and efficiency in data archiving processes. It serves as a reminder to developers and users alike to stay vigilant about potential bugs in software that they are either developing or using. Regular updates not only fix known issues but also improve the overall functionality and security of the software.
